summary: Full backend + frontend testing of JK Fitness landing page. All 11 backend API tests passed. All frontend flows (hero, dialog, form submit, validation, sections, packages, contact) verified working.

minor.issue: In server.py, `logger` is used at line 92 (inside create_lead) but defined at line 126. This means if a DB insert fails, the except block will raise a NameError instead of logging. Core functionality works because the exception path is rarely hit.

action_items: Minor: Move `logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)` to before its first use (before the route definitions) in server.py to avoid NameError if DB insert fails.
critical_code_review_comments: logger defined after first use (line 126 vs line 92) — low risk but will cause NameError on DB failure path
seed_data_creation: Created a few TEST_ leads via API during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All flows verified: POST /api/leads (201), validation (422), GET /api/leads (200, no _id), root (200 ok). Frontend: hero loads, nav signup + hero button + package join + final CTA join all open dialog, form validation shows error toast, form submission shows success toast and closes dialog. 5 reviews and 4 packages visible. Contact details correct.
